description: No public listing required. We take the plate into Mazal custody, collect the buyer's payment, transfer the plate at the traffic department, then release funds to your account.
card_title: Who are you in this deal?
card_subtitle: We tailor the escrow flow to your side of the table.
role_seller_desc: I own the plate and want Mazal to hold it, take payment from the buyer, then transfer it.
role_buyer_desc: I've agreed a price with the seller and want Mazal to hold my funds until the plate is in my name.
bullet_1: Plate held in custody — not in seller's name during payment.
bullet_2: Buyer funds ring-fenced in a UAE escrow account.
bullet_3: Concierge handles RTA / traffic transfer end-to-end.
bullet_4: Funds released same-day on transfer confirmation.
plate_subtitle: Enter the plate and the price you've already agreed with the other party.
confirm_subtitle: We'll send them a secure invitation to confirm and sign. They don't need a public profile.
license_source_default: Mohammed Bin Rashid Establishment for SME Development
verify_box_desc: Mazal runs Emirates ID + mobile verification on the other party before the plate or money leaves their hands. Deal can't proceed without it.
transfer_subtitle: Get Mazal details from us to keep your number plate in our custody.
license_source_select: In the License Source field Select
agree_terms: I agree to Mazal escrow terms, custody conditions, and transfer instructions.
transfer_progress_desc: Thank you for completing your part of the number plate transfer process. We are now waiting for the number plate to arrive in Mazal's custody. Once it is received, we will keep you informed of the next steps.
share_otp_hint: To proceed with your private deal, securely share the transfer link or OTP with the buyer.
otp_subtitle: Please enter the verification code shared by the seller to continue the process.
payment_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to pay.
payment_secured: Your payment has been secured in the Mazal escrow account.
select_role_error: Please select seller or buyer to continue.
footer_desc: The UAE's trust-first marketplace for distinctive vehicle plates. Escrow custody, blind negotiation, live auctions.
notes_placeholder: Optional notes about this payment method
split_allocate_hint: Allocate the full agreed price. Remaining:
card_redirect_notice: You will be redirected to PayTabs to complete this card payment securely.
managers_check_instructions: Prepare the manager's check and schedule a collection. Enter the check number and choose a location, date, and time for pickup.
cash_collection_instructions: Schedule a cash collection. Choose a location, date, and time for our agent to collect the payment.
